summary: Made a minimal exit edit to preserve the chapter's approach beat while leaving the first full visual resolution of Dry Well to chapter 16. The opening construction already differed from the adjacent visible opening in the boundary context, so no opening rewrite was needed.
edits: Pulled back the final approach image so chapter 15 no longer pre-describes Dry Well's buildings, lit bay, and waiting ship.
Shifted the landing handoff toward crew posture, engine pitch, and approach pressure to support a cleaner transition into chapter 16.
Aligned Faye's final placement with the next chapter's landing setup by moving her into the jump seat before approach.
